pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 21 confirms room URL uses this name
export_result.sh line 12 and setup_task.sh line 11 both reference this path consistently
task.json description states 'at least 5 keyboard shortcuts' and verifier.py line 103 caps scoring at 5 shortcuts
Official Jitsi documentation at https://jitsi.github.io/handbook/docs/user-guide/keyboard-shortcuts/ confirms T toggles participant stats
Official Jitsi documentation and DefKey confirm M mutes/unmutes microphone
Official Jitsi documentation and DefKey confirm V starts/stops camera
Official Jitsi documentation and DefKey confirm C opens/closes chat
Official Jitsi documentation and DefKey confirm R raises/lowers hand
Official Jitsi documentation and DefKey confirm F shows/hides video thumbnails
Official Jitsi documentation and DefKey confirm S toggles fullscreen

pi_items.verified_value: D (switch between camera and screen sharing)
pi_items.source: Official Jitsi documentation and DefKey confirm D switches between camera and screen sharing
Official Jitsi documentation confirms W toggles tile view; multiple sources including GitHub wiki and DefKey corroborate

pi_items.verified_value: E is not a standard Jitsi Meet keyboard shortcut
pi_items.source: Official Jitsi documentation (https://jitsi.github.io/handbook/docs/user-guide/keyboard-shortcuts/), DefKey (https://defkey.com/jitsi-meet-shortcuts), and multiple search results show no E key binding. Standard shortcuts are: F, M, V, A, C, D, P, R, S, W, T, G, ?, SPACE, 0-9
Official Jitsi documentation and DefKey confirm A manages call quality
Official Jitsi documentation and DefKey confirm SPACE is push to talk
Official Jitsi documentation and DefKey confirm ? shows/hides keyboard shortcuts
Official Jitsi documentation and DefKey confirm 0 focuses on own video
Official Jitsi documentation and DefKey confirm 1-9 focus on other participant videos
Official Jitsi documentation confirms W key toggles tile view; verifier.py expects this layout at line 180

privileged_info_summary: The task is a Jitsi Meet keyboard shortcuts learning exercise. The room name 'team-standup-daily' is created for this specific task at http://localhost:8080/team-standup-daily. The output file is written to /home/ga/shortcuts_reference.txt and must contain at least 5 keyboard shortcuts from Jitsi Meet's documented set. Valid shortcuts include: T (show stats), M (mute), V (camera), C (chat), R (raise hand), F (thumbnails), S (fullscreen), D (screen share), W (tile view), A (quality), SPACE (push to talk), ? (help), and 0-9 (focus). The task requires switching the meeting layout to tile view using the W key shortcut. NOTE: The metadata includes 'E' as a valid key, but this is not a documented Jitsi Meet keyboard shortcut according to official sources.
